pi_items.source: Verified URL 'https://www.ndbc.noaa.gov/data/historical/stdmet/41046h2022.txt.gz' in setup_task.sh and checked the file contents.
Verified from task description and verifier.py regex match `Maximum Wave Height:\s*([0-9.]+)\s*m`.
Verified from task description and verifier.py regex match `Minimum Pressure:\s*([0-9.]+)\s*hPa`.
Verified via manual inspection of the downloaded NOAA text file, column 9 which defaults to 99.00 when data is missing.
Verified via manual inspection of the downloaded NOAA text file, column 13 which defaults to 9999.0 when data is missing.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real-world historical oceanographic text data downloaded directly from NOAA (Station 41046 for the year 2022). Verification confirms that missing wave height values are recorded as 99.00 and missing pressure values as 9999.0, correctly reflecting standard NDBC conventions. The expected output formats for wave height and pressure have also been verified against both the task description and verifier scripts.
